hooks.command: try{$j=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json;$c=$j.tool_input.command;if($null -ne $c -and $c -match 'spring-boot:run'){$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess;if($p){Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -EA SilentlyContinue}};if($null -ne $c -and $c -match 'npm run dev'){$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess;if($p){Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -EA SilentlyContinue}}}catch{}
